enums.name: KubernetesConfigurationProvisioningState
enums.doc: The provisioning state of the resource.

values.name: Error
values.doc: Indicates an error status from the extension.

values.name: Warning
values.doc: Indicates a warning status from the extension.

values.name: Information
values.doc: Indicates an informational status from the extension.

enums.name: ManagedServiceIdentityType

values.name: SystemAssigned,UserAssigned
values.doc: System and user assigned managed identity.

enums.doc: Type of managed service identity (where both SystemAssigned and UserAssigned types are allowed).

enums.name: KubernetesClusterAutoUpgradeMode

values.name: none
values.doc: The extension will not be automatically upgraded.

values.name: patch
values.doc: The extension will be automatically upgraded to the latest patch version within the minor version.

values.name: compatible
values.doc: The extension will be automatically upgraded to compatible versions as determined by the user.

enums.doc:
The upgrade mode for auto upgrade.
The default is "compatible".

values.name: User
values.doc: The entity was created by a user.

values.name: Application

values.name: ManagedIdentity
values.doc: The entity was created by a managed identity.

values.name: Key
values.doc: The entity was created by a key.

enums.doc: The kind of entity that created the resource.

enums.name: ResourceProvisioningState
enums.doc: The provisioning state of a resource type.

baseModel.name: ProxyResource

baseModel.name: Resource
baseModel.doc: Common fields that are returned in the response for all Azure Resource Manager resources

properties.name: id
properties.doc: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource. Ex - /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}

properties.name: name
properties.doc: The name of the resource

properties.name: type
properties.doc: The type of the resource. E.g. "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines" or "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"

properties.name: systemData
properties.doc: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

type.name: SystemData
type.doc: Metadata pertaining to creation and last modification of the resource.

properties.name: createdBy
properties.doc: The identity that created the resource.

properties.name: createdByType
properties.doc: The type of identity that created the resource.

properties.name: createdAt
properties.doc: The timestamp of resource creation (UTC).

properties.name: lastModifiedBy
properties.doc: The identity that last modified the resource.

properties.name: lastModifiedByType
properties.doc: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

properties.name: lastModifiedAt
properties.doc: The timestamp of resource last modification (UTC)

properties.name: properties
properties.doc: Properties of an Extension resource

properties.name: extensionType
properties.doc: Type of the Extension, of which this resource is an instance of.  It must be one of the Extension Types registered with Microsoft.KubernetesConfiguration by the Extension publisher.

properties.name: IsAutoUpgradeMinorVersionEnabled
properties.doc: Flag to note if this extension participates in auto upgrade of minor version, or not.

properties.name: releaseTrain
properties.doc: ReleaseTrain this extension participates in for auto-upgrade (e.g. Stable, Preview, etc.) - only if autoUpgradeMinorVersion is 'true'.

properties.name: version
properties.doc: User-specified version of the extension for this extension to 'pin'. To use 'version', autoUpgradeMinorVersion must be 'false'.

properties.name: scope
properties.doc: Scope at which the extension is installed.

type.name: KubernetesClusterExtensionScope
type.doc: Scope of the extension. It can be either Cluster or Namespace; but not both.

properties.name: cluster
properties.doc: Specifies that the scope of the extension is Cluster

type.name: KubernetesClusterExtensionScopeCluster
type.doc: Specifies that the scope of the extension is Cluster

properties.name: releaseNamespace
properties.doc: Namespace where the extension Release must be placed, for a Cluster scoped extension.  If this namespace does not exist, it will be created

properties.name: namespace
properties.doc: Specifies that the scope of the extension is Namespace

type.name: KubernetesClusterExtensionScopeNamespace
type.doc: Specifies that the scope of the extension is Namespace

properties.name: targetNamespace
properties.doc: Namespace where the extension will be created for an Namespace scoped extension.  If this namespace does not exist, it will be created

properties.name: configurationSettings
properties.doc: Configuration settings, as name-value pairs for configuring this extension.

properties.name: configurationProtectedSettings
properties.doc: Configuration settings that are sensitive, as name-value pairs for configuring this extension.

properties.name: currentVersion
properties.doc: Currently installed version of the extension.

properties.name: provisioningState
properties.doc: Status of installation of this extension.

properties.name: statuses
properties.doc: Status from this extension.

properties.name: code
properties.doc: Status code provided by the Extension

properties.name: displayStatus
properties.doc: Short description of status of the extension.

properties.name: level
properties.doc: Level of the status.

properties.name: message
properties.doc: Detailed message of the status from the Extension.

properties.name: time
properties.doc: DateLiteral (per ISO8601) noting the time of installation status.

properties.name: errorInfo
properties.doc: Error information from the Agent - e.g. errors during installation.

properties.name: code
properties.doc: The error code.

properties.name: message
properties.doc: The error message.

properties.name: target
properties.doc: The error target.

properties.name: details
properties.doc: The error details.

properties.name: additionalInfo
properties.doc: The error additional info.

valueType.name: ErrorAdditionalInfo
valueType.doc: The resource management error additional info.

properties.name: type
properties.doc: The additional info type.

properties.name: info
properties.doc: The additional info.

properties.name: customLocationSettings
properties.doc: Custom Location settings properties.

properties.name: packageUri
properties.doc: Uri of the Helm package

properties.name: aksAssignedIdentity
properties.doc: Identity of the Extension resource in an AKS cluster

type.name: ManagedServiceIdentity
type.doc: Managed service identity (system assigned and/or user assigned identities)

properties.name: principalId
properties.doc: The service principal ID of the system assigned identity. This property will only be provided for a system assigned identity.

properties.name: tenantId
properties.doc: The tenant ID of the system assigned identity. This property will only be provided for a system assigned identity.

properties.name: type
properties.doc: The type of managed identity assigned to this resource.

properties.name: userAssignedIdentities
properties.doc: The identities assigned to this resource by the user.

properties.name: principalId
properties.doc: The principal ID of the assigned identity.

properties.name: clientId
properties.doc: The client ID of the assigned identity.

properties.name: isSystemExtension
properties.doc: Flag to note if this extension is a system extension

properties.name: autoUpgradeMode
properties.doc:
The upgrade mode for auto upgrade.
The default is "compatible".

properties.name: managementDetails
properties.doc: Management details of the extension

type.name: KubernetesClusterManagementDetails
type.doc: Metadata about the managing entity of the extension and the permitted operations.

properties.name: category
properties.doc: The category of the managing entity

properties.name: accessDetails
properties.doc: The list of access details of the managing entity

valueType.name: KubernetesClusterAccessDetail
valueType.doc: Metadata about the access details of the managing entity of the extension

properties.name: entity
properties.doc: The entity to which the access details apply

properties.name: allowedActions
properties.doc: The list of allowed actions for the entity

properties.name: description
properties.doc: The description of the entity

properties.name: additionalDetails
properties.doc: Additional details provided by the publisher of the extension.

type.name: KubernetesClusterAdditionalDetails
type.doc: Additional details provided by the publisher of the extension.

properties.name: docs
properties.doc: Documentation for the extension.

properties.name: releaseNotes
properties.doc: Release Notes of the extension.

properties.name: troubleshootingGuide
properties.doc: Troubleshooting guide for the extension.

properties.name: extensionState
properties.doc: State of the extension on the cluster.

properties.name: name
properties.doc: Name of the Extension.

properties.name: identity
properties.doc: Identity of the Extension resource

properties.name: managedBy
properties.doc: The fully qualified resource ID of the resource that manages this resource. Indicates if this resource is managed by another Azure resource. If this is present, complete mode deployment will not delete the resource if it is removed from the template since it is managed by another resource.

properties.name: plan
properties.doc: Details of the resource plan.

properties.name: name
properties.doc: A user defined name of the 3rd Party Artifact that is being procured.

properties.name: publisher
properties.doc: The publisher of the 3rd Party Artifact that is being bought. E.g. NewRelic

properties.name: product
properties.doc: The 3rd Party artifact that is being procured. E.g. NewRelic. Product maps to the OfferID specified for the artifact at the time of Data Market onboarding.

properties.name: promotionCode
properties.doc: A publisher provided promotion code as provisioned in Data Market for the said product/artifact.

properties.name: version
properties.doc: The version of the desired product/artifact.
